author: JB
text: Run `npm run dev` from `apps/portal` and you should see 200 small green dots scattered across the world underneath the creatures. The architecture is in `docs/biology/todo/plant-grid.md` with the Phase 1–4 roadmap (circles → CA growth → hunger → ground shader).

author: JB
text: not clear, what do we have? what will I see, how do I spawn a plant?

author: JB
text: Want me to add `seed_in_region()` to `PlantGrid` and switch the seeding call, so when you run `npm run dev` you immediately see green dots mixed in with the creatures at the default zoom?

author: JB
text: right, is the system in dev-ui? do I have metrics? I need to be able to spawn a plant at a location at least in dev-ui

author: JB
text: ok, stop stop stop!. right i looked at what you did and its a pile of shit tbh. right, lets start from basics, I will be clear. we introduced a new grid, that grid needs to be cycled through and visible just like L0,L1 grids are now. I need to be able to spawn a plant at a specific grid cell. Please ask me questions and make a plan

author: JB
text: Is that what you meant by "spark stats", or did you have something different in mind?

author: JB
text: ah, if there is no new system we don't need a sparkline, just plant population. I assumed that we will need a system to manage plant updates like growth, seed events, being eaten (schrinkage) etc... we will need a qhole plant system, a system that pulls in the plant arychtype and is ready to do logic over it right?

author: JB
text: Updating the plan: simpler telemetry display (just a count number, no sparkline), and add a stub `update_plants` Bevy system.

author: JB
text: But please reflect on my ask here, you understand we essentially need a plant grid, spawn mechanics and a system to run logic over it for future growth, being eaten, biome effects etc... are you sure you knwo what I want?

author: JB
text: Is that aligned with what you have in mind, or is there something about the creature↔plant interaction model specifically that you want to nail down now before we build?
